title: Allow admin to restore a board deleted from the recycle garbage can by a user
excerpt:
Currently, a user can delete any board, and then delete it from the recycle bin. In this case, the administrator has no way of restoring the board. 
My suggestion is to allow the admin to restore a board that has been de…

posts.author: CarolineD (Caroline)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, a user can delete any board, and then delete it from the recycle bin. In this case, the administrator has no way of restoring the board.
My suggestion is to allow the admin to restore a board that has been deleted form the recycle bin (at least during 30 days)

posts.author: Will_from_Pro_Backup (Will Dewulf)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @CarolineD

I fully agree with you that the admin should be able to restore data that’s deleted permanently from the trash bin. It’s a common issue that our team has tried to solve by building Pro Backup for monday.com. We back up all boards and offer the option to restore it with a few clicks, even when it has been deleted from the trash bin.

posts.author: moritzm (Moritz)
posts.cookedHtml: I 100% agree with this. Aren’t there any options that allows an admin to control who can permanently delete items?
